miscfeatures.config.title: JulieISBaka Sundry Features
miscfeatures.config.developer_mode.label: Developer's mode
miscfeatures.config.developer_mode.toolt: When enabled, the greatest radius is no longer bound by the interface.
Open this screen anew after changing the toggle to refresh developer-only entries.
miscfeatures.config.verbose_logging.tool: Records a detailed chronicle of misc-features command execution.
Developer's mode must be enabled ere this setting take effect.
miscfeatures.config.anvil.auto_insert_ar: When enabled, /anvil places thy main-hand armour piece into slot 1.
Only applies if the main hand item be armour and slot 1 be empty.
miscfeatures.config.anvil.auto_insert_we: When enabled, /anvil places thy main-hand weapon or tool into slot 1.
Includes damageable tools/weapons, bows, crossbows, and tridents.
miscfeatures.config.anvil.auto_insert_na: When enabled, /anvil places a main-hand name tag into slot 1.
miscfeatures.config.enchant.allow_negati: When enabled, enchantment levels below naught are accepted.
miscfeatures.config.enchant.allow_high_l: When enabled, enchant levels above 255 are accepted as unsafe developer behaviour.
miscfeatures.config.enchant.prevent_crea: Prevent creative packet crash on unsafe enchants
When enabled, negative and >255 enchants are blocked for creative targets to avoid known creative-slot packet crashes.
Disable this if you want fully unsafe behaviour and accept crash risk.
miscfeatures.config.enchant.fix_high_lev: Mends enchantment tooltip levels above 10 so they display readable text instead of raw translation keys.
miscfeatures.config.enchant.high_level_s: Use Roman style for levels above 10
Switches fixed high-level enchantment display between numerals and Roman numerals.
miscfeatures.config.max_search_radius.to: Developer's mode removes the UI cap, yet the command remains bound by thy configured value.
miscfeatures.config.max_search_radius.no: In normal mode this setting itself is capped at %s.
miscfeatures.config.search_unloaded_chun: When disabled, /find block skips blocks in chunks not already loaded.
When enabled, /find block may force chunk access beyond the currently loaded area.
When disabled, /find item skips containers in chunks not already loaded.
When enabled, /find item may force chunk access beyond the currently loaded area.
When disabled, /find entity only inspects entities in already loaded chunks.
When enabled, /find entity may load chunks in range before scanning entities.
miscfeatures.config.max_search_results.t: Limits how many /find block matches are printed per block or tag target.
The total count is still reported even when the printed list is truncated.
miscfeatures.config.max_item_search_radi: Developer's mode removes the UI cap, yet the command remains bound by thy configured value.
In normal mode this setting itself is capped at %s.
miscfeatures.config.max_find_item_result: Limits how many container matches /find item prints per item or tag target.
The total item and container counts are still reported even when the printed list is truncated.
miscfeatures.config.max_entity_search_ra: Developer's mode removes the UI cap, but entity searches still only operate on loaded entities in the current world.
Entity searches only operate on loaded entities in the current world.
miscfeatures.config.max_find_entity_resu: Limits how many entity matches /find entity prints per entity or tag target.
The total count is still reported even when the printed list is truncated.
